creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Partial upgrades i.e., mixing dependencies from different svn checkouts, dates of "pkg install" or locking dependencies, are not supported. firefox will refuse to build unless you upgrade sqlite3. Some version requirement are specified in the port's Makefile

  $ fgrep sqlite www/firefox/Makefile
                  sqlite3>=3.17.0:databases/sqlite3 \
                  ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqlite3>0:databases/py-sqlite3 \

"pkg upgrade" may help you resolve this.
